name: Twice Baked Pecan Squares
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Dark brown sugar, firmly packed
1 cup Light brown sugar, firmly packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter and dark brown sugar in a bowl; cream until light and fluffy. Add 1 cup flour; mix well. Press evenly into a greased 13x9x2 inch baking pan.
2. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
3. Beat eggs until frothy. Gradually add light brown sugar, beating until smooth and thickened. Combine pecans, coconut, and 2 tbsp flour; stir.
4. Add the egg mixture, nut mixture, vanilla, and salt to the dough; mix well and spread evenly over the crust.
5. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes or until golden brown. Let cool.
6. Sprinkle lightly with powdered sugar (optional) and cut into squares.
